items.author: Hoop Informatics
items.body_excerpt:
The largest contracts in the NBA for this upcoming season in terms of percentage of the total cap they take up. 

You can find this information here www.spotrac.com/nba/rankings... and search by team or position and even look at future seasons.

images.alt:
Table titled “The NBA’s Biggest Cap Hits: Top 10 players by percentage of the salary cap, 2026-27 season.” Ranked list with team logos:

	1.	Stephen Curry, Golden State Warriors — 37.94%
	2.	Nikola Jokic, Denver Nuggets — 35.79%
	3.	Giannis Antetokounmpo, Miami Heat — 35.44%
	4.	Anthony Davis, Washington Wizards — 35.44%
	5.	Jayson Tatum, Boston Celtics — 35.44%
	6.	Joel Embiid, Philadelphia 76ers — 35.15%
	7.	Jaylen Brown, Philadelphia 76ers — 35.00%
	8.	Devin Booker, Phoenix Suns — 34.60%
	9.	Karl-Anthony Towns, New York Knicks — 34.60%
	10.	Jimmy Butler, Golden State Warriors — 34.45%

items.body_excerpt:
Rozier contacted one person on the government's no contact list. His lawyer said it was just to let the person know he couldn't talk to them because they were on that list. 

"You violated the court's trust when you sent this text message," federal judge LaShann DeArcy Hall said.

items.title: So happy for my friend @timbontemps.bsky.social on joining the Atlanta Hawks front office. Like so many Hoop Collective listeners, I'm going to miss the Tims bickering with Windy on the podcast, but I know Tim is going to do great with a strong front office in Atlanta.

items.body_excerpt:

media.title: Former ESPN NBA writer Tim Bontemps joins Hawks' front office
media.description: Former ESPN senior NBA writer Tim Bontemps has been hired for a front office role with the Atlanta Hawks.

items.title: Minnesota and Chicago both expressed strong interest in Precious Achiuwa. Real possibilities.
items.author: Mark Jones
items.body_excerpt:
Minnesota and Chicago both expressed strong interest in Precious Achiuwa. Real possibilities. 

But Sacramento remained the best fit for him. 💯.

I spent the day in the gym with Precious last week in Miami. He’s ready to compete for a starting spot this season. He’ll be in Las Vegas with the gang

items.title: Purely a cost cutting move with no argument of making Denver a better basketball team. Gotten because of the bad MPJ trade, Denver gets one season and a future cap hit out of Jonas after the coach misused him.
items.author: Jake Shapiro
items.body_excerpt:
Purely a cost cutting move with no argument of making Denver a better basketball team. Gotten because of the bad MPJ trade, Denver gets one season and a future cap hit out of Jonas after the coach misused him.

The Nuggets are owned by the largest private land owner in the USA.
